mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_post(post_id, user_id, content_uuid, media_type, media_info, location_info, status, visibility, version_num, is_edited, create_time) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{contentUuid}, #{mediaType}, #{mediaInfo}, #{locationInfo}, #{status}, #{visibility}, #{versionNum}, #{isEdited}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, user_id, content_uuid, summary, summary_status, media_type, media_info, location_info, status, visibility, version_num, is_edited, create_time FROM content_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT user_id FROM content_post WHERE post_id = #{postId} LIMIT 1

SELECT post_id, user_id, content_uuid, summary, summary_status, media_type, media_info, location_info, status, visibility, version_num, is_edited, create_time FROM content_post WHERE post_id = #{postId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT post_id FROM content_post WHERE status = 6 AND delete_time IS NOT NULL AND delete_time < #{cutoff} ORDER BY delete_time ASC, post_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT post_id, user_id, content_uuid, summary, summary_status, media_type, media_info, location_info, status, visibility, version_num, is_edited, create_time FROM content_post WHERE status = 2 AND post_id IN
#{id}
